architecture.summary: Existing CF Workers + Next.js 15 + Prisma stack. Rework of eval pipeline modules (judge, comparator, prompt-generator, eval-engine, eval-store). Keep CF AI as LLM provider.

integrations.summary: CF AI (Llama 4 Scout), Anthropic Claude API adapter, GitHub Contents API for evals.json, Cloudflare Queues for eval jobs, Prisma/D1 for storage

ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend eval pipeline, no UI changes in this increment. Admin evals page already exists.

performance.summary: Multi-run N configurable per trigger (1/3/5). Reuse existing EVAL_QUEUE. No new queues.

security.summary: N/A - reuses existing admin auth (SUPER_ADMIN + internal auth). No new auth surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: Flaky assertion detection via stddev>0.3. Non-discriminating assertion detection. Backward compat with V1 runs via nullable columns. No auto-deprecation on DEGRADING.
